_description: Golden test cases for Mentix diagnostic evaluation. These represent known-correct diagnoses.

cases.input: Product exists in admin but not on storefront
negative_signals_to_watch: Blaming DB connection before checking status
Suggesting code fix before checking data

cases.input: Message sent to group, no product in admin
cases.correct_root_cause: AUTOMATION_SECRET mismatch between n8n and Vercel
cases.correct_action: Sync AUTOMATION_SECRET in Vercel env vars and n8n HTTP request header
negative_signals_to_watch: Checking Telegram allowlist before testing the API endpoint

cases.description: Image not rendering — reverse lookup catches it
cases.input: Product shows SVG placeholder but image was uploaded
cases.correct_root_cause: products.images[] empty but media.product link exists
correct_evidence: media record found with correct product_id
cases.correct_action: Reverse lookup resolves it automatically — or manually link via admin
negative_signals_to_watch: Claiming Vercel Blob is broken before checking DB links
